name: Veggie Oat-Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Salt-reduced soy sauce or tamari
1 tbsp Each Dried Oregano and Basil
1/4 cup to 1 cup Old fashioned rolled oats
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients except the oats to a boil.
2. Turn heat to low and stir in 4.5 cups rolled oats.
3. Cook for about 5 minutes until the water is absorbed.
4. If the mixture is too soupy, add some oats at about 5 minutes and cook for only a few more minutes until thickened.
5. Fill a rectangular non-stick baking pan with the mixture (makes square patties, easier than forming little circles).
6. The pan could be anywhere from 9 x 18 inches (22.5 X 45 cm.), 12 inches (30 cm.) square or larger to make patties about a half-inch (1.3 cm.) thick.
7. If too thin, they'll be tough and will dry out.
8. Total cooking time is 45 minutes.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
10. Use a utensil that won't scratch the pan to cut the giant burger into 3.5-4 inches (10 cm.) square burgers and flip them over.
11. Cook another 20 minutes.
12. Serve in buns or as a main course, hot or cold. Can be frozen.
